about_content:
The Amity University Online MBA program is a 2 year postgraduate degree program designed by globally renowned and experienced industry experts. The Amity Online MBA is a perfect blend of theoretical and practical approaches, essential for a candidate aspiring to build a successful and prominent career in the business world.

The Amity Online University MBA program is QS ranked, making it a globally prominent B-school. The Online MBA at Amity University Online is highly flexible, following the motto of study anytime, anywhere. This flexibility motivates working-class students to pursue higher education without quitting their jobs.

To make candidates industry-ready professionals the curriculum and learning methodology of the Amity University Online MBA are crafted by considering the standards of the global market. For a better grasp of core subjects in the preferred domains of the students, the Amity Online MBA is offered in 18 diverse specializations that are integrated with real-world projects.

There are plenty of benefits to choosing the Amity University Online MBA program such as top-notch international faculty, a futuristic learning approach with AI-professor AMI, career services & placement assistance, and so on. To offer world-class education quality, students are offered access to the library and programming labs on the campus as well.
about_heading: About Amity University Online MBA Course
placement_stat_1: There are plenty of benefits to choosing the Amity University Online MBA program such as top-notch international faculty, a futuristic learning approach with AI-professor AMI, career services & placement assistance, and so on.

accreditations.item: Approval for online degrees by the University Grants Commission (UGC).
World Education Services accreditation in Canada.
Western Association of Schools and Colleges (WASC) accreditation.
Accredited with an “A+” grade by the National Assessment and Accreditation Council (NAAC).
All India Council for Technical Education (AICTE) accreditation.
Ranks #22 under the universities category of the National Institutional Ranking Framework (NIRF).
First private university in India to become a prominent member of the Digital Education Council.

eligibility_content:
Students willing to enroll in the Amity Online MBA are required to fulfill the eligibility criteria of the program along with the admission requirements mentioned below:

  • The applicant must have completed a 10+2 formal educational qualification from a recognized board of education.
  • Along with the 12 years of formal education, a bachelor’s degree in any domain is required from a valid and recognized university.
  • The applicant must be familiar with and have an intermediate understanding of the English language.

highlights.item: A 24 month interest-free easy EMI facility is offered under the Amity online MBA program as financial aid.
Amity University Online is among the top B schools in India and all of its abroad and Indian campuses are interconnected through a highly secure pirate network of their own.
Students enrolled in the Amity Online MBA can access the last-minute revision classes offered at all Amity University campuses.
The Amity University online MBA placement assistance conducts online placement drives every fortnight.
Amity University Online is among the most renowned private universities and its vast network of notable alumni includes  Kunal Khemu, Disha Patani, Himansh Kohli, Urfi Javed, etc.

admission_steps:
Working professionals or students who are willing to pursue an online MBA program must follow the below-listed steps involved in the Amity online admission process:

Step 1. Select the online MBA program along with the best-suited specialization as per your career goals.

Step 2. Complete the application form on Amity University Online's official website by providing personal information.

Step 3. Pay the program fee using your chosen payment mode and fee plan.

Step 4. Once the application form is completely filled, submit it and complete the registration process.

Step 5. Once the admission is confirmed, Amity Online will share the enrollment details.
syllabus_content:
The curriculum of Amity University Online MBA program is industry-oriented which makes the core subjects of the initial 2 semesters the same for each specialization and the choice for preferred subjects is given under the last 2 semesters. To give a detailed and brief overview of the Amity Online MBA program, the syllabus of the general Online MBA is listed below:

Semester I

Semester II

  • Marketing Management
  • Managerial Economics
  • Statistics for Management
  • Professional communication
  • Accounting for Managers
  • Legal Aspects of Business
  • Business Research Methods
  • Financial Management
  • Human Resource Management
  • Conflict Resolution and Management

Semester III

Semester IV

  • Strategic Management
  • Minor Project
  • Professional Ethics
  • Specialization Elective 1
  • Specialization Elective 2
  • Specialization Elective 3
  • Specialization Elective 4
  • Major Project
  • Management in Action Social Economic and Ethical Issues
  • Digital Marketing
  • Specialization Elective 1
  • Specialization Elective 2
placement_content:
To ensure the professional growth of every individual enrolled at the Amity University Online MBA program, the placement support facility has 500+ hiring partners offering 3000+ job opportunities that cover every industry and domain. To make students compatible with the global competitive market and guide them in developing the skills and abilities required to match global standards, Amity Online MBA includes multiple career services such as resume-building workshops, interview preparation, industry mentorship, etc.

The major active hiring partners of Amity University Online that hire Online MBA graduates include:

  • IBM
  • Microsoft
  • SBi
  • HDFC
  • Nokia
  • Paytm
  • KPMG
  • Wipro

faqs.question: What is the Amity University Online MBA fee?
faqs.answer: The entire 2 year Amity University Online MBA fee is INR 1,99,000/- without incurring any financial aid.

faqs.question: What is the ranking of Amity University Online MBA?
faqs.answer: Amity University Online ranks #35 under the universities category of the National Institutional Ranking Framework (NIRF).

faqs.question: Does Amity Online provide placement?
faqs.answer: Yes, Amity University Online MBA placement support offers an enormous number of hiring partners i.e. 500+ active partners.

faqs.question: Can I take direct admission to the Amity Online MBA?
faqs.answer: Yes, if you have scored a minimum of 40% aggregate marks in graduation then you can seek direct admission under the Amity Online MBA program.

faqs.question: What career opportunities can I expect after completing the Amity Online MBA?
faqs.answer: A student is entitled to opt for multiple job opportunities after completing the Amity Online MBA depending on the specialization chosen by them.

faqs.question: How is the Amity University Online MBA program?
faqs.answer: Amity University Online MBA is an ideal choice for students and working professionals as Amity University Online is among the top B Schools.

faqs.question: How can I apply for the Amity University Online MBA program?
faqs.answer: You can apply directly for the Amity University Online MBA through its official website.

faqs.question: What are the requirements to join the Amity Online MBA program?
faqs.answer: The applicant must have completed a valid bachelor’s degree with a 10+2 formal education to join the Amity Online MBA program.

placement_stat_2: What career opportunities can I expect after completing the Amity Online MBA? A student is entitled to opt for multiple job opportunities after completing the Amity Online MBA depending on the specialization chosen by them.

reviews.item: My experience with amity online MBA was nothing less than a roller coaster ride for me as I was among the covid batch but the univeristy was very supportive and I enjoyed it.
Being a working professional enrolling in an online MBA is a challenge but amity online assisted me at every stage of my academic journey. Kudos to them.
The amity online mba faculty members are very friendly and helped in scoring good marks in a short span of time.
Everything is okay about amity university online but there are a few areas of improvement but everything seems nice to me. I recommend it to others too.
